summary: T2 remediation reached sufficient closure for final acceptance. F1-R restored contract governance capacity, F2-C replaced the invalid compliance path with an independent PASS attestation, and F3-R5 removed the misleading evidence-first strong-semantic terminology from active code and skill surfaces.
remaining_risks: F3-R5 execution artifacts are split across 2026-03-06 and 2026-03-07 archive dates, which may create mild traceability friction.
Some non-F1 intents in intent_map.yml still point to migration-doc paths; these are outside the current remediation scope.
